columns.extraction_plan: Locate the "Methods" section on page 1, which describes the random assignment to treatment arms. Identify the arm that includes abiraterone and prednisone. Further details on the abiraterone and prednisone dosage and administration are found in the "Procedures" section on page 3. Combine the description of the "standard of care" (which could include ADT alone or ADT with docetaxel) with the specific abiraterone and prednisone regimen.
